name: Tomato & Liver Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into wedges (makes about 2 cups); set aside.
2. Cut liver into 1/2-inch wide strips; set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine soy sauce, sherry, cornstarch, sugar, salt, and ginger. Add liver; marinade for 15 to 20 minutes.
4. In a medium skillet or wok, heat 2 tablespoons of water. Add liver and marinade to the skillet. Cook and stir until partially cooked, about 2 minutes. Remove from skillet and set aside.
5. To the skillet, add the remaining 2 tablespoons of water. Add onions; cook and stir until onions are crisp and tender, about 3 minutes.
6. Add tomatoes; cook and stir until tomatoes are tender, 1 minute.
7. Add reserved liver and marinade; cook and stir until meat is cooked but still pink in the center, about 2 minutes.
8. Serve with cooked rice, if desired.
